message:
feat(demo): add visual effects screen and integrate theme system

Major enhancement to ftui-demo-showcase demonstrating the new text-effects
and theme modules:

New Visual Effects Screen (2579 lines):
- Comprehensive showcase of all text_effects capabilities
- Interactive demo with multiple effect categories:
  * Fade effects (fade-in, fade-out, pulse)
  * Gradient fills (horizontal, vertical, diagonal, radial)
  * Animated gradients with configurable speed
  * Color cycling (rainbow, breathing, wave)
  * Character effects (typing, scramble, glitch)
- Keyboard controls to cycle through effects
- Performance metrics display

Dashboard Enhancements (640+ lines added):
- Rich animated dashboard with charts and gauges
- Theme-aware color palette
- Real-time data visualization examples
- Improved layout with responsive constraints

Theme System Integration:
- All screens updated to use new theme tokens
- Consistent color scheme across entire demo
- Runtime theme switching support
- Removed hardcoded colors in favor of semantic tokens

Screen Updates:
- chrome.rs: Theme-aware header/footer styling
- app.rs: Theme initialization and screen registration
- All screen modules: Updated to use theme colors

The demo now serves as both a feature showcase and a visual regression
test suite for the terminal rendering system.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
